description_long: This house is a two-story residential building surrounded by a variety of mature trees, creating a lush, private setting. The structure features a light-colored exterior with blue window shutters and doors, giving it a coastal or Mediterranean feel. The front approach includes a wide staircase leading up to a prominent entryway, flanked by landscaped greenery and a paved driveway with parked vehicles. The roof is a simple gable style, and the windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, providing a balanced and orderly appearance. Outdoor seating and patio areas are visible, suggesting spaces for relaxation and social gatherings. The property is enclosed by trees, enhancing privacy and blending the house into its suburban or semi-urban environment.
description: A two-story house with a light facade, blue shutters, and a gable roof, surrounded by mature trees and landscaped paths. Features include a wide front staircase, symmetrical windows, and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main staircase, entryway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the gable roof, and the tree-lined perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio area, additional windows, and more outdoor seating.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, parked vehicles, and the continuation of the tree border.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide staircase leading to a central door with blue shutters, flanked by landscaping and a paved approach.
